pi_items.source: Confirmed from fraud_detection_spec.txt created in setup_task.sh which explicitly requires these exact conditions to be checked.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated healthcare claims data injected with specific fraud patterns. I verified that the task strictly requires identifying Benfords Law violations (chi-square > 15.51), statistical outliers (claims > 3 stddev above provider mean), duplicate claims (same patient, procedure, and service date within 7 days), and upcoding (provider usage > 2 stddev from population average). These requirements match the generated fraud_detection_spec.txt file, and the agents PL/SQL package results are evaluated based on these flags.
